# Hydrochemistry

**Summary**: The study of the chemical composition of waters in geological settings.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994]] analyzed hydrochemistry to determine the source and behavior of brine minerals.

## Scientific Context

- [[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994]] Hydrochemistry reveals the interaction between brine, minerals, and source waters.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994]] Chemical analysis of collected brine samples.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Sodium and chloride concentrations show a 60% increase from summer to winter, linked to seasonal water level changes. ([[1994-al-guwaizani|Al-Guwaizani, 1994, p. 62]])
